## What does this PR add?

- [ ] Stack template: `templates/stacks/[name].md`
- [ ] Feature scaffold: `templates/features/[name].md`
- [ ] Agent: `agents/[name].md`
- [ ] Command: `commands/[name].md`
- [ ] Skill: `skills/[name].md`
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Other

## Description

What did you add or fix? One paragraph.

## Testing

How did you test this? (e.g. "Used this template on a Django project for 2 days — output was noticeably better")

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the file format in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Tested with Claude Code on a real project
- [ ] One focused contribution (not multiple unrelated things)
- [ ] No sensitive information (API keys, IPs, passwords) in examples
